## Pull Request – FOURTIFY

### Summary
Brief description of changes (1-2 sentences).

### Related Issue
Closes #(issue number)

### Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactor
- [ ] Testing

### Screenshots (if UI change)
| Before | After |
|--------|-------|
| (image) | (image) |

### Testing Evidence
- [ ] Unit tests passed
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] No console errors

### Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No new warnings

### Risk Level
- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High
